verse.name: v1
verse.lines: All we like sheep have gone astray Each of us turning our own separate way We have all sinned and fallen short of Your glory

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: But Your glory is what we desire to see And in Your presence is where we long to be.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Oh Lord, show us Your mercy and grace Take us to Your Holy place Forgive our sin and heal our land We long to live In Your presence once again

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Taking our sickness, taking our pain Jesus the sacrifice Lamb has been slain He was despised, rejected by men, He took our sin.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Draw us near to You Father through Jesus Your Son Let us worship before You And cleansed by Your blood.
